step_rationale: Apoptotic protease; cardiomyocyte death in ischemia-reperfusion.
mechanism: Caspase activation executes apoptosis and cleaves contractile proteins in cardiomyocytes during ischemic injury and reperfusion-mediated cell death.

references.title: Degradation of troponin I in serum or plasma: mechanisms, and analytical and clinical implications.

trials.title: The Role of Colchicine in Reducing The Rate of Myocardial Reperfusion Injury in Patients With ST-Elevation Myocardial Infarction After Primary Percutaneous Coronary Intervention: Study on NLRP3, ASC, Caspase, and Troponin
